0.$description: Fully invisible. Hidden elements, v-show/display:none alternative, animation start state.

100.$description: Fully opaque. Default for all visible, interactive content.

disabled.$description: Disabled UI elements. Material Design standard. Apply to disabled buttons, inputs, labels, and icons.

subtle.$description: Dimmed. Modal/drawer backdrop, secondary icon tints, skeleton shimmer base.

muted.$description: De-emphasized. Inactive tabs, unfocused sidebar items, placeholder icons.

soft.$description: Soft presence. Hover ghost states, watermarks, image overlays with text on top.

medium.$description: Semi-transparent. Frosted panel overlays, sidebar tints, map overlays in field view.

high.$description: Nearly opaque. Tooltip backgrounds, toast surfaces, contextual overlay panels.
